title: astragalus baba-alliar
intro: Astragalus baba-alliar is a type of plant commonly known as Mongolian milkvetch, belonging to the Fabaceae family of legumes. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus baba-alliar include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Astragalus baba-alliar can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
